mnemonics: HOT PIE: Hypothesis Testing, Outlier Treatment, Plots, Inferential stats, Exploratory Data Analysis
keyPoints: Understand how to handle missing data and outliers
Be proficient in creating visualizations (ggplot2) to support findings
commonMistakes: Using the wrong statistical test for a hypothesis (e.g., using t-test for proportions)
Forgetting to set a seed for reproducible results when using random sampling
Creating misleading visualizations by ignoring scale or using inappropriate chart types
